description: Baseline user feedback signals that seed route monitor patterns.

entries.recommendedAction: When an owner path, symbol, or exact selector is already known, start from owner or query routes instead of search prime.
entries.sourceSummary: Do not hard-code seed or prime first when evidence already identifies the owner or selector.

entries.recommendedAction: Keep displayLineRange and sourceLocatorHint out of executable selector positions; execute structural selectors only.
entries.sourceSummary: Line numbers should not be agent-executable selectors; they are display hints.

entries.recommendedAction: Prefer parser-owned owner, syntax, and query-code routes before falling back to source windows.
entries.sourceSummary: Use query language and AST parser routes instead of deterministic line-window reading.

entries.recommendedAction: Only claim a route or answer is verified when replayable command, packet, or test evidence is attached.
entries.sourceSummary: Verification claims need concrete evidence; skeleton or intent alone is not enough.
